'''fonahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelic|nickelic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelic|nickelic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fonahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fonahithi|fonahithi]] || [[word:fonahiji|fonahiji]] || [[word:fonahishi|fonahishi]] || [[word:fonahiki|fonahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fonahuthuthu|fonahuthuthu]] || [[word:fonahujuju|fonahujuju]] || [[word:fonahushushu|fonahushushu]] || [[word:fonahukuku|fonahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fonahuthu|fonahuthu]] || [[word:fonahuju|fonahuju]] || [[word:fonahushu|fonahushu]] || [[word:fonahuku|fonahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fonahufthuf|fonahufthuf]] || [[word:fonahufjuf|fonahufjuf]] || [[word:fonahufshuf|fonahufshuf]] || [[word:fonahufkuf|fonahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fonahethe|fonahethe]] || [[word:fonaheje|fonaheje]] || [[word:fonaheshe|fonaheshe]] || [[word:fonaheke|fonaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fonahothotho|fonahothotho]] || [[word:fonahojojo|fonahojojo]] || [[word:fonahoshosho|fonahoshosho]] || [[word:fonahokoko|fonahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fonahotho|fonahotho]] || [[word:fonahojo|fonahojo]] || [[word:fonahosho|fonahosho]] || [[word:fonahoko|fonahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fonahofthof|fonahofthof]] || [[word:fonahofjof|fonahofjof]] || [[word:fonahofshof|fonahofshof]] || [[word:fonahofkof|fonahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfthÃŸf|fonahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfjÃŸf|fonahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfshÃŸf|fonahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfkÃŸf|fonahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fonahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fonahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fonahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fonahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfthÃŸf|fonahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfjÃŸf|fonahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfshÃŸf|fonahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfkÃŸf|fonahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfthÃŸf|fonahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfjÃŸf|fonahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfshÃŸf|fonahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fonahÃŸfkÃŸf|fonahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fonahÃḊthÃḊ|fonahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fonahÃḊjÃḊ|fonahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fonahÃḊshÃḊ|fonahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fonahÃḊkÃḊ|fonahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fonahathatha|fonahathatha]] || [[word:fonahajaja|fonahajaja]] || [[word:fonahashasha|fonahashasha]] || [[word:fonahakaka|fonahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fonahatha|fonahatha]] || [[word:fonahaja|fonahaja]] || [[word:fonahasha|fonahasha]] || [[word:fonahaka|fonahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fonahafthaf|fonahafthaf]] || [[word:fonahafjaf|fonahafjaf]] || [[word:fonahafshaf|fonahafshaf]] || [[word:fonahafkaf|fonahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fonahasha|fonahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fonahshÃḋsha|fonahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fonahrosha|fonahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fonahmusha|fonahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fonahyasha|fonahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofonahnkshÃḋsha|gofonahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofonahnkrosha|gofonahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofonahnkmusha|gofonahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofonahnkyasha|gofonahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fonanahasha|fonanahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fonanahshÃḋsha|fonanahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fonanahrosha|fonanahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fonanahmusha|fonanahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fonanahyasha|fonanahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofonanahnkshÃḋsha|gofonanahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofonanahnkrosha|gofonanahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofonanahnkmusha|gofonanahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofonanahnkyasha|gofonanahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fenÃḊhasha|fenÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fenÃḊhshÃḋsha|fenÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fenÃḊhrosha|fenÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fenÃḊhmusha|fenÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fenÃḊhyasha|fenÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofenÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|gofenÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofenÃḊhnkrosha|gofenÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofenÃḊhnkmusha|gofenÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofenÃḊhnkyasha|gofenÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fonfahasha|fonfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fonfahshÃḋsha|fonfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fonfahrosha|fonfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fonfahmusha|fonfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fonfahyasha|fonfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofonfahnkshÃḋsha|gofonfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofonfahnkrosha|gofonfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofonfahnkmusha|gofonfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofonfahnkyasha|gofonfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
